Part I.
Introduction
This section provides some high-level guidance on what SRE is and why it is different from more conventional IT industry practices.
Ben Treynor Sloss, the senior VP overseeing technical operations at Googleâand the originator of the term "Site Reliability Engineering"âprovides his view on what SRE means, how it works, and how it compares to other ways of doing things in the industry, in
Introduction
.
We provide a guide to the production environment at Google in
The Production Environment at Google, from the Viewpoint of an SRE
as a way to help acquaint you with the wealth of new terms and systems you are about to meet in the rest of the book.
